title: Senior Financial Analyst - RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates:
RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates!
